Upgrade Your Banner Stand Protection with Retractor Lite Carrying Cases

The Retractor Lite Carrying Case provides professional protection for all Retractor Lite banner stands up to 36". While all Retractor Lite stands include a soft carrying case, this hard case upgrade delivers enhanced protection for trade shows, events, and transport.

This durable carrying case features secure snap closures to keep your banner stand display and graphics properly stored and protected during transport. Compatible with all Retractor Lite banner stand models including 24", 31", 33", and 36" widths.

Perfect for businesses that frequently transport banner stands to trade shows, conferences, retail locations, and special events. The reinforced construction protects your investment while maintaining professional presentation standards.

Banner Stand Storage & Care Instructions

The Retractor Lite Carrying Case is designed as a protective accessory and does not require custom artwork or design files. However, proper storage techniques will maximize your banner stand and graphics lifespan.

Proper Storage Guidelines:

  • Store banner stand fully retracted in carrying case
  • Keep graphics rolled properly within banner mechanism
  • Ensure all hardware components are secured
  • Store in dry environment when possible
  • Avoid extreme temperature storage conditions

Transport Best Practices:

  • Use snap closures to secure case during transport
  • Carry case upright when possible
  • Avoid stacking heavy items on carrying case
  • Check closures before lifting or moving

Maintenance Tips:

  • Clean case exterior with damp cloth as needed
  • Inspect closures regularly for proper function
  • Replace case if damage compromises protection

For replacement graphics or additional banner stands to use with your carrying case, browse our complete selection of Retractor Lite banner stand systems.

Frequently Asked Questions - Banner Stand Carrying Cases

What banner stands are compatible with the Retractor Lite Carrying Case?

The Retractor Lite Carrying Case is compatible with all Retractor Lite banner stand models up to 36" wide, including the 24", 31", 33", and 36" width options. The case is not compatible with other banner stand series.

How is this different from the soft case included with Retractor Lite stands?

While all Retractor Lite banner stands include a soft carrying case, this hard case upgrade provides superior protection with impact-resistant construction, secure snap closures, and reinforced design for frequent transport.

Can I order multiple carrying cases for volume discounts?

Yes, we offer volume pricing for multiple carrying case orders. Contact our customer service team at 866.419.7446 or request a custom quote for pricing on quantities over 10 units.

What shipping options are available for carrying cases?

We offer standard ground shipping (3-7 days), expedited ground (2-3 days), 2-day express, and overnight express shipping. Orders placed before 2PM CST ship the same day.

Is assembly required for the carrying case?

No assembly is required. The Retractor Lite Carrying Case ships fully assembled and ready to use with your existing banner stand. Simply place your retracted banner stand inside and secure with the snap closures.

What is the warranty on Retractor Lite Carrying Cases?

The carrying case includes a standard manufacturer warranty against defects in materials and workmanship. Contact customer service if you experience any issues with closures or case integrity.

Can the carrying case be shipped internationally?

Yes, international shipping is available for carrying cases. Contact us for specific shipping quotes and delivery timeframes to your country. Additional customs and duty fees may apply.

What payment methods do you accept for accessory orders?

We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, business checks (with approval), and offer Net 30 terms for approved business accounts. Contact us to set up business account payment terms.
